signals.title: Day-3 retention dropped after onboarding changes
evidence: Biggest drop between onboarding step 2 and paywall
suggested_actions: Move paywall after first successful ring measurement
Shorten onboarding step 2 to one required input

signals.title: High feature usage but low upgrade conversion in premium flow
evidence: Users repeat free core action but do not enter checkout
Conversion loss concentrated on first paywall view
